events.name: ☆Move: To the back of the school building

parameters: event_text: To the back of the school building
But let's try a little harder♡
Even though you came to school, you don't want to go home right away. ”
Shall we slack off together? ...I'm just kidding♡"
(Let's take a class in the classroom.)
``I love spending my lunch break outside.
It's nice to be like a working adult. ”
If you end up coming back, let's spend it on campus. ”
"Well, the teachers are noisy when I sneak out during the day."
“You can’t go out to the suburbs during your lunch break, right?♡
(Don't go out during your lunch break.)
